ab: tucu a qadav tiaken a nu sirutemulu muri ku kacuin mun a sema gadu.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去山上。
en: I will take you to the mountains today.

ab: tucu a qadav tiaken a nu sinsi muri ku kacuin mun a sema gadu.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去山上。

ab: matucu ti kina liav aravac a salapeljan i gadu aya.
ch: B:媽媽說山上有很多蚊子。
en: Mom says that there are lots of mosquitoes in the mountains.

ab: tcuu a qadav tiaken a nu sinsi muri ku kacuin mun a sema vavua.
ch: A+:老師今天要帶你們去田裡。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: tcuu a qadav tiaken a nu sirutemulu muri ku kacuin mun a sema vavua.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去田裡。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: muri vaik itjen a benuljebulj?
ch: B:我們要去翻土嗎?
en: Are we going to loosen the soil?

ab: muri semainu ijtjen a vuaq?
ch: A:我們今天要去哪裡?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: muri kacuin itjen ni sirutemulu a sema ljemavingan tua pana.
ch: B:老師要帶我們去河邊。
en: Teacher will take us to the riverside.

ab: muri kacuin itjen ni sinsi a sema ljemavingan tua pana.
ch: B:老師要帶我們去河邊。
en: Teacher will take us to the riverside.

ab: muri semainu itjen a vuaq?
ch: A:我們今天要去哪裡?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: muri kacuin itjen ni sirutemulu a sema gadu.
ch: B:老師要帶我們去山上。
en: Teacher will take us to the mountains today.

ab: muri kacuin itjen ni sinsi a sema gadu.
ch: B:老師要帶我們去山上。
en: Teacher will take us to the mountains today.

ab: muri vaik itjen a vuaq a sema ljemavingan i pana?
ch: A:我們今天要去河邊嗎?
en: Are we going to the riverside today?

ab: ini, muri kacuin itjen ni sirutemulu a sema gadu.
ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.

ab: ini, muri kacuin itjen ni sinsi a sema gadu.
ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.

ab: muri sema gadu itjen a vuaq?
ch: A:我們今天要去山上嗎?
en: Are we going to the mountains today?

ab: ini, muri sema vavua itjen a vuaq.
ch: B:不是，我們今天要去田裡。
en: No, we are going to the fields.

ab: sirutemulu, anema muri tja pacunan a sema ljemavingan tua pana?
ch: A+:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?

ab: sinsi, anema muri tja pacunan a sema ljemavingan tua pana?
ch: A:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?

ab: vaik itjen a pacun tua quljicacenglav.
ch: B:我們去看蜻蜓。
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: sirutemulu, anema muri tja pacunan a sema gadu?
ch: A+:老師，我們到山上要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?

ab: sinsi, anema muri tja pacunan a sema gadu?
ch: A:老師，我們到山上要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?

ab: vaik itjen a pacun tua kalabiabi.
ch: B:我們去看蝴蝶。
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: anema tja kudain a sema vavua?
ch: A:我們到田裡要做什麼?
en: What are we going to do in the fields?

ab: muri vaik itjen a sema vavua temalem tua ljapanay, kipapaulingavu itjen ayatua izua sasiq. izua pangac lja!
ch: B:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米，要小心有螞蟻、蜜蜂唷!
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields, but you need to be aware of the ants and bees.

ab: sirutemulu, muri vaik itjen a sema ljemavingan i pana a ljemanguy?
ch: A+:老師，我們要到河邊游泳嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in the river?

ab: sinsi, muri vaik itjen a sema ljemavingan i pana a ljemanguy?
ch: A:老師，我們要到河邊游泳嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in the river?

ab: ini, muri vaik itjen a pacun tua quljicacenglav.
ch: B:不是，我們要去看蜻蜓。
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: sirutemulu, muri vaik itjen a sema vavua temalem tua ljaceng?
ch: A+:老師，我們要到田裡種菜嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?

ab: sinsi, muri vaik itjen a sema vavua temalem tua ljaceng?
ch: A:老師，我們要到田裡種菜嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?

ab: tucu a qadav muri vaik itjen a benuljebulj.
ch: B:我們今天要去翻土。
en: We are going to loosen the soil today.

ab: izua izua a miperepereper a pasasivalj a quljicacenglav.
ch: A:那裡有蜻蜓飛來飛去。
en: There are dragonflies flying around.

ab: tjau pacun aken a vuaq tua kaqulidan a valjualjut a quljicacenglav.
ch: B:我今天才看過真正活著的蜻蜓。
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: izua izua a miperepereper a pasasivalj a kalabiabi.
ch: A:那裡有蝴蝶飛來飛去。
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: ya! wa! tjengelay aken tua kalabiabi, nguanguaq aravac.
ch: B:呀!哇!我喜歡蝴蝶，很漂亮。
en: Yeh! Wow! I love butterflies. They are very beautiful.

ab: izua izua a miperepereper a pasasivalj a kalabiabi.
ch: A:那裡有蝴蝶飛來飛去。
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: inika kalabiabi azuwa, pangac azuwa.
ch: B:那不是蝴蝶，那是蜜蜂。
en: Those are not butterflies. They are bees.

ab: tjaljumazau sakamaya pacun, nakuya ljiacadja a matjuzuma dri!
ch: A:在這裡看一看，不要到太遠的地方唷!
en: Come here and take a look. Don’t go too far!

ab: ui, inika amen a ljiacadja a matjuzuma.
ch: B:好，我們不會去太遠的地方。
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ab: nakuya mekelj lja, galju a djemavac manu matjani mun.
ch: A:不要用跑的，慢慢走免得跌倒了。
en: Don’t run and walk slowly lest you fall down.

ab: muri kirimu a pacun a ku varung.
ch: B:我想趕快看到。
en: I want to see them right away.
